parameters.query:
SELECT 
  id,
  session_id,
  message->>'type' as role,
  message->>'content' as message_text
FROM n8n_chat_histories
WHERE session_id = '{{ $json.sessionId }}'
ORDER BY id ASC;

UPDATE user_contact_details
SET 
  chat_ended = true,
  last_seen = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE session_id = '{{ $('Format Email').item.json.session_id }}';

UPDATE user_contact_details
SET 
  chat_ended = true,
  last_seen = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE session_id = '{{ $json.session_id }}';

nodes.name: Mark Chat Ended (Error Path)
nodes.notes: Ensures chat is marked as ended even if email fails

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO email_transcript_logs (session_id, client_id, status, error_message, created_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.session_id }}',
  '{{ $json.client_id }}',
  'failed',
  '{{ $json.error_message }}',
  NOW()
);

nodes.name: Log Email Failure
nodes.notes: Optional: Logs email failures to database for monitoring
